downside.label: Downside -- data gap reflects a real contraction
downside.assumption: Only currently-active regions (Oceania, Southeast Asia, South Asia, Eastern Asia) continue ordering; all others remain at zero.

base.label: Base -- historical steady state continues
base.assumption: The 3-year historical daily average continues unchanged; the coverage gap is a data artifact, not a real change in ordering behavior.

upside.label: Upside -- execute investment agent recommendations
upside.assumption: Base, plus the measured growth rate in active regions (10.7% avg) weighted by their 19.1% revenue share, plus a 5% management-execution uplift from redirecting investment toward top-ranked regions/categories (a stated planning assumption, not a statistical forecast).
